query:
SELECT
            COUNT(*)::bigint AS "requests!",
            COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status NOT IN ('completed','pending','streaming'))::bigint
                AS "errors!",
            COALESCE(AVG(latency_ms), 0)::float8 AS "avg_latency!"
          FROM ai_requests
          WHERE created_at >= $1 AND created_at < $2
